channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Some Democratic donors frustrated with DNC chair Ken Martin amid fundraising woes
item.description: The RNC outraised the DNC by $9.8 million, according to March FEC filings.

item.title: Hundreds of homes damaged in Mississippi storms as multiple tornadoes reported
item.description: Powerful storms that included at least one confirmed tornado have torn through parts of Mississippi, collapsing hundreds homes, tearing up trees and d...

item.title: Hantavirus live updates: 2 infected patients in isolation in Dutch hospitals
item.description: The MV Hondius cruise ship, on which the hantavirus infection was identified, is making its way to the Canary Islands.

item.title: Is the Iranian regime really in a "state of collapse" as Trump claims?
item.description: As Trump pushes for a deal with an Iranian regime he portrays as deeply fractured, analysts say power in Tehran may be shifting, but that doesn't mean...
